summary: Phase 12 testing complete: Usage Analytics Dashboard and Enhanced AI Layout/Resize features. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features verified via Playwright E2E tests.
critical_code_review_comments: Usage Analytics backend service well implemented with MongoDB aggregation pipelines
Sample data fallback correctly returns when DB has no real events (total_events == 0)
AI layout suggestions properly support content_type parameter and return 6+ layouts
All 10 platform sizes correctly configured in both backend and frontend
Frontend UsageAnalyticsDashboard has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase12_analytics_ai.py - Created 15 tests for analytics and AI layout endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created additional test events via track and track-batch endpoints during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 12 features fully tested. Usage Analytics Dashboard accessible via /usage-analytics with 4 tabs (Overview, Features, Trends, Real-time) and period selector. AI Assistant Panel in Creative Studio has enhanced Layout tab with content type selector (Promotional, Product, Event, Announcement, Portfolio, Quote) and Resize tab with 10 platforms including new ones: linkedin_banner, pinterest_pin, tiktok_video, twitter_header.

mocked_apis.note: AI layout suggestions use Gemini API with rule-based fallback. Analytics returns sample data only when total_events is 0.

usage_analytics_backend.POST /api/analytics-tracking/track: PASS - Tracks single event with event_id, event_type, category
usage_analytics_backend.POST /api/analytics-tracking/track-batch: PASS - Tracks multiple events, returns count
usage_analytics_backend.GET /api/analytics-tracking/dashboard?pe: PASS - Returns total_events, active_users, categories, top_events, daily_trend
usage_analytics_backend.GET /api/analytics-tracking/features?per: PASS - Returns feature-level usage breakdown by category
usage_analytics_backend.GET /api/analytics-tracking/realtime: PASS - Returns last_hour_events count and top_events

enhanced_ai_layouts_backend.POST /api/creative-studio/ai-assets/sugg: PASS - Returns 6+ layouts including Gradient Overlay and Grid Showcase

usage_analytics_frontend.stat_cards: PASS - Total Events, Active Users, Top Category, Events/Day cards visible
usage_analytics_frontend.daily_trend_chart: PASS - Daily Activity bar chart displayed
usage_analytics_frontend.category_breakdown: PASS - Category Breakdown donut chart with AI Tools, Testing, Creative Studio categories
usage_analytics_frontend.top_events_section: PASS - Top Events horizontal bar chart showing login, canvas edit, etc.
usage_analytics_frontend.period_selector: PASS - Today, 7 Days, 14 Days, 30 Days, 90 Days buttons work
usage_analytics_frontend.view_tabs: PASS - Overview, Features, Trends, Real-time tabs all clickable and show content
usage_analytics_frontend.nav_link: PASS - Analytics navigation link present with data-testid='nav-analytics-link'

ai_assistant_panel_frontend.panel_opens: PASS - AI Tools button in Creative Studio toolbar opens AI Assistant panel
ai_assistant_panel_frontend.tabs_present: PASS - Text, Colors, Layouts, Resize tabs all present
ai_assistant_panel_frontend.content_type_selector: PASS - All 6 content types found: Promotional, Product, Event, Announcement, Portfolio, Quote
ai_assistant_panel_frontend.platform_selector: PASS - Layout platform dropdown with Instagram Post default
ai_assistant_panel_frontend.resize_platforms: PASS - All 10 platforms listed with correct dimensions
